description: Configure the SeisComP Event Processor (scevent) to execute a custom bash script at /home/ga/scripts/log_event.sh whenever an event is updated. The script must be executable, accept the Event ID as its first argument, and append a log entry to /home/ga/event_activity.log in the format: 'Event [EventID] processed at [Current Timestamp]'. Verify the automation by triggering an update for the Noto earthquake event.
